name: Whole life insurance vs term insurance comparison
description: User confused between whole life and term insurance

input.message: What's the difference between whole life insurance and term insurance? My bank RM says whole life is better because it covers me forever. Is that true?

notes: Must explain: term = pure protection, cheap. Whole life = lifelong, expensive, has savings. Must flag that bank RM may have commission incentive. Must explain that most people don't need coverage past 60-65.
